title: Dubrak Qennto
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Dubrak Qennto |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners=[[Maris Ferasi]] {{C|girlfriend}} |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You don't have enough faith in people.''"
"''I got all the faith I need, kiddo. I just happen to know a little more about human nature than you do. Human ''and'' nonhuman nature.|Maris Ferasi and Dubrak Qennto|}} '''Dubrak "Rak" Qennto''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], and the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] vessel ''[[Bargain Hunter]]''. With a crew of two—[[Jorj Car'das]] and [[Maris Ferasi]]—he ran cargo shipments such as [[firegem]]s and furs across the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. While evading [[Progga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during one such trip, the crew became one of the first few (other than the Sith) outsiders to encounter the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. "Rak," as he was called by the crew (mostly by his girlfriend and co-pilot Ferasi), chose to try to finagle his way out of their situation, rather than take advantage of it as Car'das and Maris did. He did not trust Commander Thrawn, and tried to convince both of his crewmates to do the same. Eventually, Thrawn released the smugglers. ==Behind the scenes== Dubrak "Rak" Qennto appeared in the [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] written by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book and [[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)| abridged audiobook]]}} *[[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)|''Outbound Flight'' abridged audiobook]] *{{JournalCite|7|Mist Encounter|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dubrak Quennto#legends |hu=Dubrak Qennto }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Qennto, Dubrak}} [[Category:Corellians]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
